question_text: What does the law of conservation of energy state?

options.label: B
options.text: Energy can be created and destroyed freely

options.label: C
options.text: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transferred or transformed

options.label: D
options.text: Energy is only conserved in closed systems

explanation: The law of conservation of energy is one of the most fundamental laws in physics. It means the total amount of energy in a closed system always stays the same—energy just changes from one form to another (like chemical to heat to light).
